description:
India Book (IB) II, 7: Letter from Amram b. Yosef, probably from Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1075. 
Regarding a shipment of palm leaves that arrived from outside of Egypt. In addition, mentions purchase of wheat and a disagreement about packaging cloth that belongs to the writer but another person named Muslim (probably his Jewish name is Meshulam) denies that is his. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #679) VMR

See IB II, 2–9: On Abu ’l-Faraj Nissīm, who disappeared in India, and his camphor (Goitein and Friedman, India Traders, 288–290)
tags: 11th c, Nahray B. Nissim, IB2, India, ib-untranslated-eng
description_he: ספר הודו II,7: מכתב מעמרם בן יוסף לנהראי בן ניסים, על משלוח עלי דקל ויריבות על אריזת בד, כ-1075
